name: set_budget
description: Create or update the spending budget for a user agent. Requires Supervisor Tier 2 or higher. Use this to allocate or adjust how much an agent is permitted to spend. Period can be 'cumulative' (never resets) or 'monthly' (resets on the 1st of each month).

agent_id.description: The identifier of the agent whose budget is being set.

limit.description: The budget limit in cents (e.g. 10000 for $100.00).

period.description: Budget period: 'cumulative' (never resets) or 'monthly' (resets on the 1st of each month). Defaults to 'cumulative'.
